description: Farming crops and fruits for Our Legacy farming system

wheat.name: Wheat
wheat.description: A common grain crop, takes 3 days to mature

corn.name: Corn
corn.description: A nutritious crop that grows well in summer

tomato.name: Tomato
tomato.description: A versatile red fruit, popular for cooking

potato.name: Potato
potato.description: A hearty root vegetable with many uses

carrot.name: Carrot
carrot.description: A crisp and sweet orange vegetable

apple.name: Apple
apple.description: A juicy fruit from an apple tree

strawberry.name: Strawberry
strawberry.description: A sweet and delicate red berry

dragon_fruit.name: Dragon Fruit
dragon_fruit.description: A rare and exotic magical fruit

rice.name: Rice
rice.description: A staple grain from the eastern wetlands of Yixuan, needs flooded soil to thrive

bamboo_shoots.name: Bamboo Shoots
bamboo_shoots.description: Tender young bamboo shoots, prized in eastern cooking

soybeans.name: Soybeans
soybeans.description: Versatile eastern legumes used in countless preparations

sugarcane.name: Sugarcane
sugarcane.description: Tall sweet stalks from southern climates, pressed for their precious juice

black_pepper.name: Black Pepper
black_pepper.description: Prized spice from the southern wetlands, worth its weight in silver on northern markets

mushroom.name: Mushroom
mushroom.description: Earthy fungi that thrive in shade and damp — good eating, some are medicinal

barley.name: Barley
barley.description: Hardy grain that survives cold climates — staple of northern clans and border towns

sunflower.name: Sunflower
sunflower.description: Tall golden flowers with oil-rich seeds, beloved by northern farmers

melon.name: Melon
melon.description: A large and sweet summer fruit, cool and refreshing in hot weather

pumpkin.name: Pumpkin
pumpkin.description: A hearty autumn gourd, good for soups, pies, and keeping through winter

jade_lotus.name: Jade Lotus
jade_lotus.description: A rare eastern water flower with potent medicinal properties, grown in still ponds

bread.name: Bread
bread.description: A basic staple food made from wheat

corn_soup.name: Corn Soup
corn_soup.description: A warm and comforting soup made with corn

apple_pie.name: Apple Pie
apple_pie.description: A delicious baked treat with apples

fruit_smoothie.name: Fruit Smoothie
fruit_smoothie.description: A refreshing blend of berries and fruit

dragon_fruit_juice.name: Dragon Fruit Juice
dragon_fruit_juice.description: A magical and potent juice made from dragon fruit

rice_bowl.name: Rice Bowl
rice_bowl.description: A simple but filling bowl of steamed rice, a staple across Yixuan

stir_fry.name: Stir Fry
stir_fry.description: Bamboo shoots, soybeans and vegetables cooked swiftly over high flame — an eastern classic

mushroom_stew.name: Mushroom Stew
mushroom_stew.description: A rich and earthy northern stew, warming in cold weather

barley_bread.name: Barley Bread
barley_bread.description: Dense and nourishing bread from northern grain, long-lasting on the road

pumpkin_soup.name: Pumpkin Soup
pumpkin_soup.description: A thick autumn soup, warming and sweet — a harvest favourite

sweet_melon_slice.name: Sweet Melon Slice
sweet_melon_slice.description: A cool and refreshing slice of summer melon, perfect after a long march

jade_lotus_tea.name: Jade Lotus Tea
jade_lotus_tea.description: A rare medicinal brew from the eastern jade lotus flower. Restores vitality and clears the mind.

warriors_grain.name: Warrior's Grain
warriors_grain.description: A dense cake of barley, honey, and rendered fat, eaten by Varak clan warriors before battle

pepper_broth.name: Pepper Broth
pepper_broth.description: A fiery soup brewed with black pepper and root vegetables, clears the lungs and warms the blood
